Max Pain at 657 acts as magnetic target. Positive 0DTE GEX provides short-term stability, but structural negative GEX in further expiries signals volatility risk on breakdown.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Range-bound with pinning risk around 585-590; positive short-term GEX suppresses volatility while negative monthly GEX amplifies tail risk
outlook.summary: Spot trapped between massive ATM put wall (588, 75K OI monthly) and max pain cluster (585-590). Triple-expiry resonance at 580 support and 600 resistance defines structural range. High put volume ratio (1.63-1.81) with bearish monthly skew indicates hedging pressure, but positive 0DTE/WEEKLY GEX suggests dealer stabilization near current levels.

levels.motivazione: Dominant call OI across ALL expiries: 12,745 (0DTE), 8,358 (WEEKLY), 42,961 (MONTHLY). Dealers short calls = sell futures on rallies, creating strong resistance.
Major put concentration across ALL expiries: 9,984 (0DTE), 8,643 (WEEKLY), 32,569 (MONTHLY). Exceptional volume (247K 0DTE) confirms institutional defense.
Massive 75,518 put OI at spot (MONTHLY). ATM gamma exposure creates pinning behavior. Dealers long puts = buy dips, reinforcing support.
Strong put OI in WEEKLY (17,157) and MONTHLY (44,631). Deep support with dealer hedging tail risk.
Max Pain for 0DTE and WEEKLY. Exceptional volume (286K CALL, 194K PUT 0DTE) indicates aggressive positioning. Price magnet < 1% from spot.
Monthly Max Pain with 50K+ combined OI. Mixed CALL/PUT activity creates equilibrium zone. Target for expiration pinning.
0DTE gamma inflection point. Spot below = negative gamma zone amplifies moves. Cross above triggers dealer stabilization.
